de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class SchemaRecoder2KeYConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Recoder2KeYConverter
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.SchemaRecoder2KeYConverter

  • public class SchemaRecoder2KeYConverter
extends Recoder2KeYConverter
    This is an extension of the usual Recoder2KeYConverter that supports schema variables. Some entities have to be treated differently, but most conversions are handled identically (via the superclass).

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Recoder2KeYConverter

        locClass2finalVar

    • Constructor Detail

      • SchemaRecoder2KeYConverter

        public SchemaRecoder2KeYConverter(SchemaRecoder2KeY rec2key,
                                  Services services,
                                  NamespaceSet namespaceSet)
        create a new schema-recoder-to-key converter. It must be associated with a schema recoder2key.
        Parameters:
        rec2key - the object to associate to
        namespaceSet - namespaces to resolve entity names
        services - services to be used

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public ProgramTransformer convert(RKeYMetaConstruct mc)
        convert a program meta construct creating a new object corresponding to the name. If you add a ProgramTransformer to the system you will most propably have to register it here.

      • convert

        public ProgramTransformer convert(RKeYMetaConstructExpression mc)
        translate schema variables to ProgramMetaConstructs. If you have an expression meta construct you will have to add it here.

      • convert

        public ProgramTransformer convert(RKeYMetaConstructType mc)
        translate schema variables to ProgramMetaConstructs. If you have a type meta construct you will have to add it here.

      • convert

        method-call-statements are expanded to method-frames

        public SuperReference convert(SuperReference sr)
        Description copied from class: Recoder2KeYConverter
        Convert a super referene. Special handling because the initializing Expressions and the ReferencePrefix accessPath might not be disjunct.

      • convert

        public Expression convert(FieldReference fr)
        Description copied from class: Recoder2KeYConverter
        converts a recoder field reference. A ProgramVariable is created replacing the field reference.
        Overrides:
        convert in class Recoder2KeYConverter
        Parameters:
        fr - the recoder field reference.

      • convert

        public MethodReference convert(MethodReference mr)
        Description copied from class: Recoder2KeYConverter
        converts a recoder method reference. A de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ProgramMethod is created replacing the method reference.
        Overrides:
        convert in class Recoder2KeYConverter
        Parameters:
        mr - the recoder method reference.
        Returns:
        the Method the KeY Dependance
